element_introduction_order.element: Adventure game verbs (examine, collect, use objects)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player learns object interaction and puzzle solving fundamentals through exploration without consequence
Obtains hints and plot information; dialogue informs puzzle solutions; no wrong conversational choices

element_introduction_order.element: Inventory management (pulling items from Manny's coat)
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Visual inventory review supports puzzle-solving without UI overlay
Replaces traditional cursor-over text; teaches player to read character animation for interactive object hints
Requires combining collected objects, scenery interaction, and NPC dialogue to progress; no death/failure states preserve player agency

element_introduction_order.element: Land of the Dead setting and lore
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Aztec afterlife cosmology combined with 1950s film noir aesthetics; contextualizes all puzzles and character motivations

typical_relief_triggers: Successful puzzle completion unlocks dialogue and story progression
Character interactions reveal plot information, reducing narrative uncertainty
Location transitions to new areas of the Land of the Dead
Inventory examination shows collected progress toward solutions
typical_tension_triggers: Cryptic NPC hints without obvious solution path
New location with unfamiliar objects and characters
Plot complications (rival agents, time pressure narratively)
Visual design of surreal/unsettling afterlife environments
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Conversational pacing with exploration-driven tension; adventure game structure alternates exploration phases (discovery/confusion) with dialogue phases (clarification/progress). No time pressure or action sequences; tension emerges from puzzle obscurity rather than external threat. Relief tied to problem-solving completion and narrative progression.

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Off-path explorable areas and background objects that Manny's head-turn attention mechanics highlight; players learn to follow character animation cues to locate optional interactions
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Dead ends and exploratory branches are naturalized by the setting (Land of the Dead locations are interconnected but not all paths lead forward); character animations guide toward relevant objects without UI

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction through simple object collection and basic 2-step puzzles; NPC dialogue provides clear hints; player learns interaction verbs (examine, use, combine) with minimal friction
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Puzzle complexity increases; multi-step chains require collecting objects across multiple locations and combining NPC dialogue information; player must retain puzzle state across backtracking
difficulty_curve.late_game: Complex interconnected puzzles with less explicit hinting; player relies on environmental observation and internalized puzzle logic; narrative tension increases but mechanical difficulty remains puzzle-focused rather than action-based
notable_spikes: Transition from introductory location to main Land of the Dead when player must synthesize multiple location types and character relationships
Late-game sequences requiring memory of earlier conversations and item combinations

notable_level_patterns.description: Each distinct location (Department of Death office, port areas, etc.) functions as a contained puzzle environment where multiple NPCs, interactive objects, and inventory items combine into a solution gate. Locations interconnect but are revisited for item collection and hint refinement.

Story progression blocked by conversation trees; player must exhaust dialogue options with multiple characters to gather information enabling puzzle solution. Reinforces adventure game pattern where NPCs are puzzle elements themselves.

Items and puzzle solutions distributed across previously visited locations; player must retrace paths with new inventory state or dialogue knowledge to unlock progression. Backtracking is natural rather than punitive due to environmental interest and narrative embedding.
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Multi-location puzzle chains connecting land areas
